name: @zcaceres/skill-boilerplate-openssf
description: Scaffold OpenSSF Scorecard GitHub Action in a repo with a safe two-phase rollout: first commit runs with publish_results: false so issues can be triaged privately, then flips to publish_results: true and adds a badge once the score is acceptable. Use when the user says 'add OpenSSF', 'set up Scorecard', 'OpenSSF boilerplate', or '/boilerplate-openssf'.
